title: 第 26 節
en: Ahura Mazda answered : * He is a Peshotanu : two hundred stripes with the Aspahfi-a^^tra, two hundred stripes with the Sraosh6->tarana/ 26 (79). O Maker of the material world, thou Holy One ! If a man commit an Aredu^, what penalty shall he pay?
Ahura Mazda answered : * Fifteen stripes with the Aspahfi-a^tra, fifteen stripes with the Sraosh6-i6arana.
27(81). *0n the second Aredu^, thirty stripes with the Aspah^-a^tra, thirty stripes with the Sraosh6-/('arana ;
fifty stripes with the Sraosh6-/Jarana ;
' On the fourth, seventy stripes with the Aspaheaytra, seventy stripes with the Sraoshd-^arana ;

a^tra, ninety stripes with the Sraosho-iarana/ 28. O Maker of the material world, thou Holy One! If a man commit an Aredu^ for the sixth time, without having atoned for the preceding, what penalty shall he pay ?

Ahura Mazda answered : ' He is a Pesh6tanu : two hundred stripes with the Aspah^-a^tra, two hundred stripes with the Sraosh6-/^arana/ 29 (82). O Maker of the material world, thou Holy One ! If a man commit an Areduj, and refuse to atone for it, what penalty shall he pay ?
Ahura Mazda answered : * He is a Pesh6tanu : two hundred stripes with the Aspah6-artra, two hundred stripes with the Sraosho /'nrana.'
30 (S5). O Maker of the material world, thou Holy One! If a man smite another and huit him sorely, what is the penalty that he shall pay ?
31 (87). Ahura Mazda answered: ' Thirty stripes FARGARD IV. 43 with the Aspahd-artra, thirty stripes with the Sraoshd-^rana ;
' The second time, fifty stripes with the Aspahfiajtra, fifty stripes with the Sraosh6-/Jarana ;
' The third time, seventy stripes with the Aspah^a^ra, seventy stripes with the Sraosh6-iferana ;

' The fourth time, ninety stripes with the AspahSartra, ninety stripes with the Sraoshd-^arana/ 32 (89). If a man commit that deed for the fifth time, without having atoned for the preceding, what is the penalty that he shall pay?

Ahura Mazda answered : * He is a Peshdtanu : two hundred stripes with the Aspah6-a^tra, two hundred stripes with the Sraosh6-^arana/ 33 {90). If a man commit that deed and refuse to atone for it, what is the penalty that he shall pay ?

Ahura Mazda answered : * He is a Pesh6tanu : two hundred stripes with the Aspahfi-aytra, two hundred stripes with the Sraosh6-iarana/ 34 (93)' O Maker of the material world, thou Holy One! If a man smite another so that the blood come, what is the penalty that he shall pay ?
Ahura Mazda answered : ' Fifty stripes with the Aspah6-artra, fifty stripes with the Sraosh6-iarana ;
• The second time, seventy stripes with the Aspahfia5tra, seventy stripes with the Sraosh6-^rana ;
a^tra, ninety stripes with the Sraosh6-^arana/ 35 (95). If he commit that deed for the fourth time, without having atoned for the preceding, what is the penalty that he shall pay ?
Ahura Mazda answered : * He is a Pesh6tanu : two hundred stripes with the Aspah^-a^tra, two hundred stripes with the Sraosho-zJarana/ 44 vendIdAd.
36 (96). O Maker of the material world, thou Holy One! If a man smite another so. that the blood come, and if he refuse to atone for it, what is the penalty that he shall pay ?
Ahura Mazda answered: 'He is a Peshdtanu: two hundred stripes with the Aspah6-a5tra, two hundred stripes with the Sraosh6-iarana.'
37 (99)- O Maker of the material world, thou Holy One [ If a man smite another so that he break a bone, what is the penalty that he shall pay?
Ahura Mazda answered : ' Seventy stripes with the Aspahfi-a^tra, seventy stripes with the Sraoshd^arana ;
• The second time, ninety stripes with the Aspah6aftra, ninety stripes with the Sraosh6-^arana.'
38 {102), If he commit that deed for the third time, without having atoned for the preceding, what is the penalty that he shall pay ?
Ahura Mazda answered : ' He is a Pesh6tanu : two hundred stripes with the Aspah6-artra, two hundred stripes with the Sraoshd-^rana«'
39 (104). O Maker of the material world, thou Holy One! If a man smite another so that he break a bone, and if he refuse to atone for it, what is the penalty that he shall pay?
Ahura Mazda answered : * He is a Peshdtanu : two hundred stripes with the Aspahfi-aJtra, two hundred stripes with the Sraoshd-^rana.'
40 (106). O Maker of the material world, thou Holy One! If a man smite another so that he give up the ghost, what is the penalty that he shall pay?
Ahura Mazda answered : * Ninety stripes with the Aspah6-anra, ninety stripes with the Sraoshd-ifarana.'
zh: 阿胡拉‧馬茲達回答：「他是一個佩肖塔奴（Peshotanu）：用阿斯帕赫-阿特剌（Aspahi-a-tra）鞭打二百下，用斯拉歐什塔剌那（Sraosh6-tarana）鞭打二百下。」26 (79)。啊，物質世界的造物主，至聖者！若一人犯下阿雷杜（Aredu）之罪，他應當承受何等懲罰？
阿胡拉‧馬茲達回答：「以阿斯帕赫-阿斯特拉（Aspahfi-atra）施以十五鞭，以斯拉歐什-卡拉納（Sraosh6-i6arana）施以十五鞭。
第二十七（八十一）。在第二個Aredu上，用Aspah‧a‧tra施以三十鞭，用Sraosh‧/‧cara施以三十鞭；
用斯若什─雅拉那（Sraosh6-/Jarana）打五十鞭；
在第四次，用阿斯帕海特拉（Aspaheaytra）鞭打七十下，用斯拉歐什達拉那（Sraoshd-^arana）鞭打七十下；
阿特拉（atra），九十條鞭笞與斯拉歐什-亞拉那（Sraosho-iarana）/ 28. 物質世界的造物主，至聖者！如果一個人第六次犯下阿雷杜（Aredu），而未曾為前面的罪行贖罪，他應當承受何種懲罰？
阿胡拉‧馬茲達回答：「他是一位沛什陀努（Peshôtanu）：用阿斯帕赫－卡特剌（Aspah-astra）鞭打二百下，用斯拉歐什－卡剌納（Sraosh-karana）鞭打二百下（82）。物質世界的創造者，神聖者啊！若一個人犯了阿瑞杜智（Areduj）之罪，並拒絕贖罪，他應當承受何種懲罰？
阿胡拉‧瑪茲達回答道：「他是一位佩什窩塔努（Peshotanu）：用阿斯帕希－阿爾特拉（Aspahe-astra）鞭打兩百下，用斯拉歐什‧馬納（Sraosho-mrana）鞭打兩百下。」
30 (S5). 物質世界的創造者啊，聖聖者！若一人擊打他人，使其受重傷，其應支付何種懲罰？
阿胡拉‧瑪茲達應答：「三十鞭刑以Aspahd-artra施行，三十鞭刑以Sraoshd-^rana施行；
第二次，用阿斯帕赫菲亞特拉（Aspahfiajtra）抽五十鞭，用斯拉奧什-嘉拉那（Sraosh6-/Jarana）抽五十鞭；
第三次，用阿斯帕赫拉（Aspahra）施以七十鞭，用斯拉歐什─伊費拉納（Sraosha-iferana）施以七十鞭；
第四次，用阿斯帕赫‧薩爾特拉（Aspah-Sartra）鞭打九十下，用斯拉歐什德‧查拉納（Sraoshd-carana）鞭打九十下32（89）。若一男子第五次犯此罪行，而未曾為前次之罪行贖罪，他應付出何種懲罰？
阿胡拉‧馬茲達答道：「他是一個佩什塔努（Peshdtanu）：以阿斯帕赫一阿特拉（Aspah6-a^tra）施以二百鞭，以斯拉歐什一查拉那（Sraosh6-^arana）施以二百鞭。」33（90）若一人犯此罪行而拒絕贖罪，他應付出何種懲罰？
阿胡拉‧瑪茲達應答：「他是一位佩什陀努（Pesh6tanu）：以阿斯帕赫-艾特拉（Aspahfi-aytra）鞭打二百下，以斯拉歐什-伊阿拉納（Sraosh6-iarana）鞭打二百下。」(93) 「物質世界的造物主啊，至聖者！若有人毆打他人致其流血，他應當支付何等懲罰？」
阿胡拉‧馬茲達回答：「五十下『阿斯帕赫-亞特拉』（Aspah6-artra）之鞭，五十下『斯拉奧什-雅拉納』（Sraosh6-iarana）之鞭；
• 第二次，用阿斯帕赫菲特拉（Aspahfia5tra）施加七十下鞭打，用斯拉奧什-卡拉那（Sraosh6-^rana）施加七十下鞭打；
阿特剌（atra）、九十下鞭笞，並以斯若什-卡剌那（Sraosh6-^arana）處罰（35（95））。如果他第四次犯此罪行而未曾為先前之罪悔過，他應當付出何等懲罰？
阿胡拉‧馬茲達回答：「他是一位佩什陀奴（Peshótanu）：用阿斯帕-阿特拉（Aspah-átra）鞭打兩百下，用斯拉歐什－扎拉納（Sraosho-zarana）鞭打兩百下。」《萬惡律法經》（vendídâd）44。
36 (96)。物質世界的創造者啊，你這聖者！若一人擊打他人以至流血，而他拒絕為此贖罪，他應當付出何等的懲罰？
阿胡拉‧馬茲達回答道：『他是一個佩什達奴（Peshdtanu）：用阿斯帕赫－阿斯特拉（Aspah-a5tra）施加二百鞭，用斯拉奧什－亞拉那（Sraosh-iarana）施加二百鞭。』
37 (99)- 啊，物質世界的造物主，你至聖者啊！[如果一人擊傷另一人，致其骨折，他應當付出何種代價？
阿胡拉‧馬茲達（Ahura Mazda）答道：「用阿斯帕赫-阿特拉（Aspahfi-a^tra）鞭打七十下，用斯拉歐什-達拉納（Sraoshd^arana）鞭打七十下；
• 第二次，用阿斯帕赫夏特拉（Aspah6aftra）鞭打九十下，用斯拉歐什－卡剌納（Sraosh6-^arana）鞭打九十下。
38（102）若他第三次犯下該行為，而未曾為前兩次贖罪，他應當承受什麼懲罰？
阿胡拉‧馬茲達回答：『他是一位佩什陶努（Peshôtanu）：以阿斯帕赫-阿特拉（Aspahô-artra）鞭打二百下，以斯拉奧什德-卡拉納（Sraoshd-karana）鞭打二百下。』
39 (104)。物質世界的創造者啊，至聖者！若一人擊打他人以至骨骼斷裂，而彼人拒絕為此贖罪，則其應當承受何等之懲罰？
阿胡拉·馬茲達答道：「他是一個破壞者（Peshdtanu）；用阿斯帕希-阿施特拉（Aspahi-aJtra）鞭打二百下，用斯拉歐什德-卡拉納（Sraoshd-karana）鞭打二百下。」
40 (106)。物質世界的造物主啊，聖者！若一人擊打他人致其喪命，他應當支付何種罰金？
阿胡拉‧馬茲達答覆道：「用阿斯帕赫（Aspah6-anra）鞭打九十下，用斯拉歐什‧伊法拉納（Sraoshd-ifarana）鞭打九十下。」
